summary: This Consulting Agreement is between Aduro Biotech, Inc. and IREYA B.V, represented by Andrea van Elsas. The agreement outlines the terms and conditions for the consultant to provide advice and consultation to Aduro. The consultant will be paid at a rate of $500 per hour and will be responsible for their own taxes. The agreement also includes clauses for confidentiality, intellectual property, and non-solicitation. The term of the agreement is from July 1, 2020, to December 31, 2020, unless extended or terminated earlier.
termination_clause: Section 3 of the contract outlines the termination clause, which states that either party may terminate this Agreement at any time on prior written notice to the other.
confidentiality_clause: Section 4 of the contract outlines the confidentiality clause, which states that Consultant shall keep all Confidential Information confidential and not disclose, disseminate, publish, reproduce, or use it except to perform the Services.

summary: This Consulting Agreement is between Aduro Biotech, Inc. and IREYA B.V, represented by Andrea van Elsas. The agreement outlines the terms and conditions for the provision of consulting services, including compensation, confidentiality, and intellectual property. The contract is effective from July 1, 2020, and shall continue until December 31, 2020, unless extended or terminated. The Consultant is responsible for providing advice and consultation to Aduro, and Aduro shall pay the Consultant at a rate of $500 per hour. The contract also includes provisions for confidentiality, intellectual property, and non-solicitation.
termination_clause: Section 3 of the contract outlines the termination clause, which states that either party may terminate this Agreement at any time on prior written notice to the other.
confidentiality_clause: Section 4 of the contract outlines the confidentiality clause, which states that Consultant shall keep all Confidential Information confidential and not disclose, disseminate, publish, reproduce, or use Confidential Information except to perform the Services.

summary: The contract outlines the agreement between AFSALA Bancorp, Inc., Amsterdam Federal Savings and Loan Association, and Capital Resources, Inc. for the conversion of the association to a federally-chartered stock savings bank and the sale of its common stock. The company will offer and sell its common stock in a subscription offering to eligible account holders, employees, officers, and directors, and may also offer shares to the general public in a public offering. Capital Resources will assist the company with the sale of the shares and will receive a marketing fee and reimbursement for expenses. The contract also includes representations and warranties from the company and the association regarding the registration statement, conversion application, and compliance with applicable laws and regulations.
termination_clause: The obligations of Capital Resources pursuant to this Agreement shall terminate upon the completion or termination or abandonment of the Plan by the Company or the Association or upon termination of the Subscription and Public Offerings, or if the terms of the Conversion are substantially amended so as to materially and adversely change the role of Capital Resources, but in no event later than 45 days after the completion of the Subscription and Public Offerings.

summary: The contract is an agency agreement between Alamogordo Financial Corporation, AF Mutual Holding Company, and Alamogordo Federal Savings and Loan Association, and Charles Webb & Company. The agreement outlines the terms of a stock offering, including the sale of up to 1,101,643 shares of common stock at a purchase price of $10.00 per share. The Agent will provide consulting and advisory services to assist in the distribution of the shares. The contract includes representations and warranties from the Company, MHC, and Bank, as well as provisions for fees, expenses, and termination.
termination_clause: The obligations of the Agent pursuant to this Agreement (other than those set forth in Sections 2(d), 8 and 9 hereof) shall terminate upon the completion or termination or abandonment of the Plan by the Company or upon termination of the Offering, but in no event later than the date (the 'End Date') which is 45 days after the Closing Date (as hereinafter defined).
liability_clause: The Company, the MHC, and the Bank jointly and severally represent and warrant to and agree with the Agent as follows: ...

summary: This Agency Agreement is between General Electric Capital Corporation and Duckwall-Alco Stores, Inc. The Company is appointed as the agent of Lessor to order, receive, and accept equipment on behalf of Lessor. The agreement outlines the duties of the agent, including ordering and receiving equipment, and the terms and conditions of the lease. The agreement also includes provisions for termination, payment, and documentation.
termination_clause: Section 3.01: Either party may terminate this Agreement at any time upon 30 days written notice to the other party, provided that such termination shall not act as a termination of any equipment leased hereunder.
liability_clause: Section 2.01: The Company agrees to act on behalf of Lessor and in the name of Lessor, to the extent necessary to carry out its duties under this Agreement. Section 2.02: The Company agrees to perform all obligations of the purchaser in the time and manner required by the applicable Purchase Order.

summary: This contract is a joint content license agreement between WPT Enterprises, Inc. and Zynga Inc. The agreement grants WPT a non-exclusive license to use Zynga's licensed property, and Zynga a non-exclusive license to use WPT's licensed property. The agreement has a term of three years, with an option to renew for an additional two years. Zynga will pay WPT an annual minimum guarantee of $3 million, and a royalty of 10% of the net revenue from the use of WPT's brand on the Zynga platform.
termination_clause: This Agreement will be in effect for three (3) years from the Effective Date (Initial Term) unless terminated earlier in accordance with this Agreement.

summary: This contract is an agency agreement between Mutual Insurance Corporation of America (MICOA) and Stratton, Cheeseman & Walsh-Nevada, Inc. (Agency). The Agency is authorized to solicit, receive, and transmit proposals for healthcare liability insurance contracts in Nevada. The agreement outlines the terms and conditions of the agency relationship, including commissions, policy cancellation, termination, and indemnification. The Agency is required to maintain valid errors and omissions insurance and fidelity and electronic crime policy. The agreement also includes provisions for dispute resolution through arbitration.
termination_clause: This agreement shall terminate: a. Automatically if any public authority cancels or declines to renew the Agency's license or Certificate of Authority. b. Immediately if either party gives detailed written notice to the other of alleged gross and willful misconduct, fraud or material misrepresentation. c. Upon either party giving at least one hundred twenty (120) days advance written notice to the other, if not otherwise contrary to applicable law or this Agreement.
liability_clause: The Agency shall indemnify and hold MICOA harmless against any act or omission of the Agency, except to the extent MICOA has caused, compounded, or contributed to such error.

summary: The contract is an agency agreement between Athens Bancshares Corporation and Keefe, Bruyette & Woods, Inc. for the offering of common shares in a subscription and community offering. The agreement outlines the terms and conditions of the offering, including the appointment of the agent, the sale and delivery of shares, and the representations and warranties of the company and the bank. The company and the bank represent and warrant that the registration statement has been declared effective and that no stop order has been issued. The agent is entitled to a management fee, success fee, and reimbursement of expenses.
termination_clause: The obligations of the Agent pursuant to this Agreement shall terminate upon termination of the Offering, but in no event later than 45 days after the completion of the Subscription Offering (the End Date).
liability_clause: The Company and the Bank jointly and severally represent and warrant to and agree with the Agent as follows: (a) The Registration Statement which was prepared by the Company and the Bank and filed with the Commission has been declared effective by the Commission, no stop order has been issued with respect thereto and no proceedings therefor have been initiated or, to the knowledge of the Company or the Bank, threatened by the Commission.

summary: This agreement is between Biopure Corporation and an Agent for the promotion, sale, and collection of payment for veterinary products. The Agent is appointed as a distributor agent within a specified territory and is responsible for meeting sales objectives and following the Company's credit policy. The Company will provide training and promotional materials, and the Agent will be compensated through a discount on the products. The agreement outlines the terms of payment, warranties, and liabilities, including the Company's limitation of liability for incidental or consequential damages.
liability_clause: The Company will not be liable for incidental or consequential damages. The Agent will indemnify the Company (and its officers, directors, employees, agents and affiliates) and hold it (and them) harmless from and against all loss, damage, liability, cost or expense of any nature whatsoever, including, without limitation, any and all reasonable attorneys fees and court costs

summary: The contract is an agency agreement between Blue Hills Bancorp, Inc. and Keefe, Bruyette & Woods, Inc. for the offering of up to 24,150,000 shares of common stock. The agreement outlines the terms of the offering, including the sale and delivery of shares, representations and warranties of the Blue Hills Parties, and the compensation and fees to be paid to the Agent. The contract also includes provisions for the termination of the agreement and the obligations of the parties in the event of termination.
termination_clause: The obligations of the Agent pursuant to this Agreement shall terminate upon termination of the Offering, but in no event later than 45 days after the completion of the Subscription Offering, unless extended (the End Date).
liability_clause: The Blue Hills Parties, jointly and severally, represent and warrant to and agree with the Agent as follows: (a) The Registration Statement, which was prepared by the Blue Hills Parties and filed with the Commission, has been declared effective by the Commission, no stop order has been issued with respect thereto and no proceedings therefor have been initiated or, to the knowledge of the Blue Hills Parties, threatened by the Commission.

summary: This Content Licensing Agreement between Data Call Technologies, Inc. and PLAN_B MEDIA AG allows plan_b to use Data Call Technologies' content for commercial distribution to end users in the specified territory. The agreement outlines the terms and conditions, including obligations, revenues, intellectual property rights, confidentiality, and termination. The initial term of the agreement is 24 months, with automatic extension for an additional 6 months unless terminated by either party with 60 days' written notice.
termination_clause: 7.1 Unless otherwise stated in the Appendix the term of this letter Agreement shall continue for twenty-four (24) months with the effective date unless terminated sooner or extended pursuant to the terms hereof ('Initial Term'). The Initial Term shall automatically be extended for an additional period of half a year unless either party provides the other party with written notification of termination of the letter Agreement at least 60 days prior to end of such period.
confidentiality_clause: 6.1 Each Party shall keep in confidence all material and information, including without limitation Content, received from the other Party and marked as confidential or which should be understood to be confidential, and may not use such material or information for any other purposes than those set forth in this Agreement.
liability_clause: 5.4 LICENSOR warrants that Content does not infringe an intellectual property right enforceable in the agreed country of delivery or use. LICENSOR indemnifies and holds harmless plan_b against all claims that Content infringes any of the above mentioned rights of a third Party. LICENSOR shall pay all damages awarded in a trial to a third Party.
